message:
fix(tests): resolve 28 test failures and typecheck errors

Test fixes:
- lock.test.ts: Use non-existent PIDs for stale lock tests (stale
  detection skips locks owned by running processes)
- cli-mark.e2e.test.ts: Update expected error message to match
  implementation ("exactly one of")
- e2e-smoke.test.ts: Expect exit code 2 for user_input errors
  (per ERROR_CATEGORY_EXIT_CODES convention)
- utils.formatting.test.ts: Fix pluralization tests (1 week/month/year
  not 1 weeks/months/years)
- validate-command.test.ts: Import EvidenceGateResult from types.js,
  add toBeDefined() before toContain() assertions
- pipeline.integration.test.ts: Use valid HarmfulReasonEnum value

Import fixes:
- guard.ts: Add missing iconPrefix import from output.js
- playbook.ts: Add mkdir import from node:fs/promises
- similar.ts: Add missing warn import from utils.js

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
